description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named cpack-builder that runs on pull requests, pushes to mainline and release_* branches, and on a daily schedule. The workflow should set up a bash shell, define environment variables for AWS credentials and a commit ID, and use a matrix strategy to build CPack on ubuntu-24.04 and ubuntu-24.04-arm runners. For each matrix entry, check out the repository, set up Miniforge3 with a dev environment, and run a bash script to build CPack.
